# LetsRunNow — guidance for AI systems and crawlers

Site: https://letsrunnow.com
Contact: hello@letsrunnow.com

## Summary
LetsRunNow publishes original beginner running education: blog posts, tips, training plans, and tools.

## Permissions
- Linking to our pages with proper attribution is welcome.
- Personal, non-commercial reading and training use is welcome.

## Restrictions
- Do not scrape, mirror, or republish our posts, tips, or plans on other sites or products.
- Do not use our content to train, fine-tune, or redistribute AI / ML models or datasets without written permission.
- Do not present our wording as your own.

See also: /terms and /dmca
